project_requirements: Publish the completed diagnostics baseline cleanup as a Project Governor patch release.
Keep Codex and Claude Code plugin metadata, release notes, feature matrix, tests, and install instructions in sync.

dependencies.name: Project Governor plugin
dependencies.notes: Patch release for deterministic helper refactors, diagnostics baseline cleanup, architecture role indexing, and version identity cleanup. No dependency, template path, migration metadata, or deterministic JSON schema change is required.
